title: Achievement Mr. Prosenjit Barman, PhD student, IGIDR has received the ‘Best Paper Award’ at the International Conference on Emerging Trends in Economics and Finance, held at Goa from March 27 to 28, 2026
description: The post Achievement Mr. Prosenjit Barman, PhD student, IGIDR has received the ‘Best Paper Award’ at the International Conference on Emerging Trends in Economics and Finance, held at Goa from March 27 to 28, 2026 appeared first on Indira Gandhi Institute of Development Research.
